title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Vegapunk, Kizaru, Emeth, Luffy, Unknown person #11 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHOAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: I'm praying that this message gets...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Trans- mitted safely.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Hound, sir!! What is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a snake, a boar, a bird, and now a robot!! Where did these giant creatures come from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I honestly don't have the faintest idea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's the huge robo!!

dialogue.speaker: Emeth
dialogue.text: An iron giant?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Joy boy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am happy we got to meet again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Over here... you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I realize it would be foolish to blindly trust in a one-sided account of a 900-year-old battle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I came like before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your enemy is my enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I am glad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can fight for you again...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Joy boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can talk?! That's so cool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will protect you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We must pound them to dust!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems vecapunk's speech is all but over...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...from danger, Joy Boy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, straw hat, is he a friend?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not really. He was saying something about protecting...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Some guy called Joy Boy!! Who even is that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It talked??? We didn't hear a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Woah!! Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: enough chit-chat!! shoot!! We can't let them get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, ma'am!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I think we should be able to scrutinize and learn about the past from every perspective possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...I only wish I had more time.

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
